summary: Iteration 89 - Hispalo Predict Notifications feature fully tested. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All features working correctly. Cron endpoint sends notifications for overdue predictions, in-app notifications display with Zap icon, clickable links navigate to /dashboard/predictions.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/health returns status=ok
BACKEND: GET /api/user/notifications returns 200 with notifications list and unread_count
BACKEND: GET /api/user/notifications?limit=5 respects limit parameter
BACKEND: PUT /api/user/notifications/{id}/read marks notification as read
BACKEND: PUT /api/user/notifications/read-all marks all notifications as read (unread_count becomes 0)
BACKEND: Notification endpoints require authentication (401/403 for unauthenticated)
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/cron/predict-notifications requires admin role (403 for customer)
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/cron/predict-notifications requires authentication (401/403 for unauthenticated)
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/cron/predict-notifications returns 200 for admin with correct response structure
BACKEND: Cron endpoint skips already-notified users within 24h (duplicate prevention)
BACKEND: predict_overdue notifications have correct type, title, message, and link fields
BACKEND: Notifications have created_at timestamp
BACKEND: Admin login works (admin@hispaloshop.com)
BACKEND: Customer login works (test@example.com)
FRONTEND: Homepage loads with main header
FRONTEND: Customer login works
FRONTEND: Notification bell visible in header after login
FRONTEND: Notification dropdown opens on bell click
FRONTEND: predict_overdue notification displays with Zap icon (red-500 color)
FRONTEND: Notification is a clickable link
FRONTEND: Clicking predict_overdue notification navigates to /dashboard/predictions
FRONTEND: Hispalo Predict page displays products with status badges (vencidos/pronto)
FRONTEND: Prediction cards show product name, image, progress bar, confidence, and Recomprar button
critical_code_review_comments: Good implementation - notification CRUD properly extracted to routes/notifications.py
Cron endpoint correctly checks for overdue predictions and sends both in-app and email notifications
Duplicate prevention (24h cooldown) working correctly - tested with consecutive calls
Frontend NotificationsBell component uses Lucide icons correctly (Zap with text-red-500 for predict_overdue)
Notification links properly configured to navigate to /dashboard/predictions
All required data-testid attributes present for testing
seed_data_creation: None - used existing order data and notifications
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 89 tested the Hispalo Predict Notifications feature. Backend endpoints at /api/user/notifications for CRUD and /api/admin/cron/predict-notifications for cron job. Frontend notification bell in Header.js shows predict_overdue notifications with Zap icon (red). Clicking navigates to /dashboard/predictions. Test user test@example.com has 1 overdue product (Air Popped Popcorn) and 3 upcoming. Email sending also configured in cron endpoint.

feature_verification.cron_creates_notifications: PASS - Creates in-app notifications with predict_overdue type
feature_verification.cron_skips_duplicates: PASS - Second call within 24h skips already-notified users
feature_verification.get_notifications_list: PASS - Returns notifications array with unread_count
feature_verification.frontend_notification_bell: PASS - Bell visible in header with badge
feature_verification.frontend_predict_overdue_icon: PASS - Zap icon with red-500 color displayed
